stdout:
stored in SDN-YooVault as "<name>-bot-client-secret"
#   3. App id stored in SDN-YooVault as "<name>-bot-app-id"
#   4. Bot Framework channel registration with messaging endpoint:
#        https://openclaw-sdneuro.westus2.cloudapp.azure.com/<name>/api/messages
#   5. Teams app uploaded to org catalog → set TEAMS_CATALOG_ID
#   6. (later) Aixa-style device-code consent → refresh token saved as
#      "<name>-graph-refresh-token" in SDN-YooVault. The bot starts and
#      receives messages even before this step; only delegated Graph
#      actions (mail/calendar) need it.
#
# Usage:
#   make-mso-claude-bot.sh \
#     --short aixa \
#     --full "Aixa Medina" \
#     --title "RPS Admin PSG" \
#     --upn AixaM@musculoskeletalmso.com \
#     --port 3992 \
#     --app-id <bot-app-id-guid> \
#     --teams-catalog <teams-app-catalog-id> \
#     [--bot-name "Aixa Medina Claude"]   # default: "<Full Name> Claude"
#
# Idempotent: re-running overwrites generated files but preserves
# memory.md, activities.jsonl, outbound.jsonl in the bot data dir.

set -euo pipefail

# ---------- args ----------
SHORT=""; FULL=""; TITLE=""; UPN=""; PORT=""; APP_ID=""; CATALOG=""; BOT_NAME=""
while [ $# -gt 0 ]; do
  case "$1" in
    --short)         SHORT="$2"; shift 2;;
    --full)          FULL="$2"; shift 2;;
    --title)         TITLE="$2"; shift 2;;
    --upn)           UPN="$2"; shift 2;;
    --port)          PORT="$2"; shift 2;;
    --app-id)        APP_ID="$2"; shift 2;;
    --teams-catalog) CATALOG="$2"; shift 2;;
    --bot-name)      BOT_NAME="$2"; shift 2;;
    *) echo "unknown arg: $1" >&2; exit 2;;
  esac
done
[ -n "$SHORT" ] || { echo "--short required" >&2; exit 2; }
[ -n "$FULL" ]  || { echo "--full required"  >&2; exit 2; }
[ -n "$TITLE" ] || { echo "--title required" >&2; exit 2; }
[ -n "$UPN" ]   || { echo "--upn required"   >&2; exit 2; }
[ -n "$PORT" ]  || { echo "--port required"  >&2; exit 2; }
[ -n "$APP_ID" ] || { echo "--app-id required" >&2; exit 2; }
[ -n "$CATALOG" ] || { echo "--teams-catalog required" >&2; exit 2; }
[ -n "$BOT_NAME" ] || BOT_NAME="$FULL Claude"

FIRST="${FULL%% *}"
TENANT="50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c"
DOMAIN="openclaw-sdneuro.westus2.cloudapp.azure.com"

echo "→ Looking up AAD object id for $UPN"
AAD_ID=$(az ad user show --id "$UPN" --query id -o tsv)
[ -n "$AAD_ID" ] || { echo "could not resolve AAD id" >&2; exit 3; }
echo "  AAD id = $AAD_ID"

echo "→ Reading client secret from SDN-YooVault/${SHORT}-bot-client-secret"
SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name "${SHORT}-bot-client-secret" --query value -o tsv)
[ -n "$SECRET" ] || { echo "secret missing in vault" >&2; exit 3; }

DATA_DIR="/home/azureuser/.${SHORT}-bot"
WORK_DIR="/tmp/${SHORT}-work"
mkdir -p "$DATA_DIR" "$WORK_DIR"

# ---------- creds.json (server-side bot creds) ----------
python3 - "$DATA_DIR/creds.json" "$TENANT" "$APP_ID" "$SECRET" <<'PY'
import json, sys
path, tenant, app_id, secret = sys.argv[1:5]
json.dump({"tenant": tenant, "app_id": app_id, "client_secret": secret}, open(path, "w"))
